/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -flto -Wl,--gc-sections -shared -Wl,-soname,libsvgtiny.so.1 -o libsvgtiny.so.1 CMakeFiles/svgtiny.dir/src/svgtiny.c.o CMakeFiles/svgtiny.dir/src/svgtiny_gradient.c.o CMakeFiles/svgtiny.dir/src/svgtiny_list.c.o CMakeFiles/svgtiny.dir/src/svgtiny_parse.c.o CMakeFiles/svgtiny.dir/src/svgtiny_path.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/app/build/contrib/libdom:/app/build/contrib/libnsutils:/app/build/contrib/libhubbub:/app/build/contrib/libparserutils: ../libdom/libdom.so.1 -lm ../libnsutils/libnsutils.so.1 ../libhubbub/libhubbub.so.1 ../libparserutils/libparserutils.so.1 -lxml2
